description_long: This is a whimsical, retro-style van with a turquoise and rust-orange paint scheme, featuring visible weathering and paint chipping for a worn, urban look. The van is adorned with playful cat-themed graphics, including a large cartoon cat face and the text 'THE ANGRY PUNK' on the sides and hood. A large satellite dish and antenna are mounted on the roof, along with two sculpted cat figures, one perched on the roof and another hanging from the side mirror. The front windshield and side windows are transparent, revealing an orange interior with visible seats. The van has four wheels, a front license plate, and various small details such as door handles, side mirrors, and headlights, giving it a lively, characterful appearance suitable for animated or stylized urban scenes.
description: A weathered, turquoise and rust-orange van with cat-themed graphics, a rooftop satellite dish, and playful cat sculptures. The van features transparent windows, an orange interior, and detailed exterior elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large cat graphic, 'THE ANGRY PUNK' text, and a cat figure on the roof; the satellite dish and side windows are visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the windshield, cat figure on the hood, satellite dish, and the license plate; the van's headlights and grille are prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another cat figure hanging from the side mirror, visible door seams, and the same cat-themed graphics as the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back doors, rear window, cat graphic, and the license plate; the satellite dish and antenna are visible on the roof.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
